name: VLSI Technology, Inc.
description: VLSI Technology, Inc. was a prominent American semiconductor company based in San Jose, California, specializing in the design and manufacture of application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs). Founded in 1979, the company played a significant role in the development of custom chip design tools and silicon fabrication services. It went public on the NASDAQ in 1983, marking a period of rapid growth in the semiconductor industry. In 1999, VLSI Technology was acquired by the Dutch multinational Royal Philips Electronics for over $1 billion, effectively ending its tenure as an independent publicly traded entity.
